title: NDIC Set To Pay 1st Liquidation Dividend To Depositors & Ex- Staff Of Defunct Peak Merchant Bank
description: As the official Liquidator of the failed Banks in Nigeria, the Nigeria Deposit Insurance Corporation (NDIC), in line with its mandate has inform the depositors & ex-staff (deposits) of defunct Pea
html:
As the official Liquidator of the failed Banks in Nigeria, the Nigeria Deposit Insurance Corporation (NDIC), in line with its mandate has inform the depositors & ex-staff (deposits) of defunct Peak Merchant Bank that it has concluded preparations to pay their first liquidation dividend.

The development is a renewed hope for those that were affected.

According to a release signed by the Director, Communication and Public Affairs, NDIC, Bashir A. Nuhu, the verification exercise would enable depositors of the defunct bank to cross-check and ascertain their account information as well as balances with the bank as at closure.

“We enjoin all eligible stakeholders of the defunct bank to visit any NDIC offices or visit NDIC Website on www.ndic.gov.ng for verification of their claims commencing from Monday, 18th September to 16th October, 2023 while the duly completed verification forms can also be sent to the Corporation’s email address at: claimscomplaints@ndic.gov.ng”
